findings.description: The North Carolina state seal image is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has the North Carolina state seal centered at the top of the letterhead. The HTML conversion does not include this image.

findings.description: The DEQ logo image is missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has the DEQ (Department of Environmental Quality) logo at the bottom of the page. The HTML conversion does not include this image.

findings.description: Letterhead layout is collapsed from a multi-column header to a single-column layout
findings.evidence: PDF has officials' names/titles on the left and the state seal centered with 'NORTH CAROLINA Environmental Quality' beneath it. HTML renders all header elements as a single left-aligned column.

findings.description: Signatures are missing from the HTML conversion
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has David Miller's handwritten signature. PDF page 2 has Brian Wrenn's and Brenda Harris's handwritten signatures. Neither signature appears in the HTML.

findings.description: Signatures of Brian Wrenn and Brenda Harris are missing from the HTML conversion of the Notice of Issuance
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows handwritten signatures for Brian Wrenn (Director) and Brenda Harris (Mining Program Administrative Assistant). HTML page 2 only has typed names without signatures.

findings.description: No images are present in the HTML despite the PDF containing the NC state seal and DEQ logo images. However, since these are decorative/branding elements, this is minor.
findings.evidence: PDF has NC state seal at top and DEQ logo at bottom of page 1; HTML has no tags.

findings.description: The cover letter section on page 1 has no heading, which is acceptable since it is a letter. The h1 is used for 'NOTICE OF ISSUANCE OF MINING PERMIT' which matches the PDF's underlined title on page 2. Structure is reasonable.
findings.evidence: h1: 'NOTICE OF ISSUANCE OF MINING PERMIT' matches PDF page 2 title.
